seoTitle: Willina vs Willmot — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Willina and Willmot. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Willina and Willmot.
heading: Willina vs Willmot — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Willina, New South Wales and Willmot, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Willmot has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Willina (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Willina or Willmot safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Willina has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Willmot scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Willina scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Willmot scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Willina or Willmot?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Willmot has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
